title: Urgent Opening Financial Analyst at BSE Global Group

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Financial Analyst at BSE Global Group
jsonLd.description:
BSE Global Group is actively seeking a talented and motivated Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team in Allahabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About BSE Global Group:
BSE Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Budgeting

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BSE Global Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
